name: ProteinMPNN-ddG
description: Given a protein structure, predict the stability for all point mutations rapidly. Implements tied decoding scheme to limit computation compared to ProteinMPNN.
capabilities: Given a protein structure, predict the stability for all point mutations rapidly
Implements tied decoding scheme to limit computation compared to ProteinMPNN

pdbFile.description: Protein structure in PDB format to predict stability changes for all point mutations
